results.reason: Source-domain biology paper documents vdW + preload/drag in gecko setae but is the analogical source, not the LLM mechanism; keyword overlap fires due to direct phrase matches in title.
Source-domain biology; no exact phrase substrings of the 8 content words appear; well below all thresholds.
Source-domain biology overview; no exact content-word phrase matches and far from the LLM functional target.

HILO hierarchical MoE adapter rank-gating is structurally close to a hierarchical nano-adapter array with conditional activation, even though it lacks an explicit two-step preload+drag and reverse-angle release.
Generative Adapter is single-pass parameter-delta contextualization, missing the two-step asymmetric preload+drag gating and reverse-angle release.
Multi-grained patch training controls token granularity only; no two-step gating or directional release.
Generic PEFT adapter family with single-pass adaptation; lacks both the preload+drag two-axis gating and the reverse-angle release.
Dual-Gated Conditional Adapter captures the two-step conditional adapter gating concept very closely; release semantics differ but the two-axis activation structure matches the PDGAC mechanism.

fail_reason: 3 hits: rank 1 (keyword_overlap=2 on 'gecko setae' and 'van der Waals adhesion'), rank 4 HILO (judge=0.72, hierarchical adapter rank gating), and rank 8 Dual-Gated Conditional Adapter (judge=0.74, two-step gated adapter activation). The PDGAC mechanism is not novel relative to existing two-step gated hierarchical adapter art and is anticipated by the explicit gecko-setae source.
